description:
SUBSCRIBE TO WATCH THE VIDEOS FIRST 
https://www.youtube.com/@govclose/?sub_confirmation=1

BECOME AN EXPERT
The GovClose Certification Overview: https://www.govclose.com

HIRE AN EXPERT
https://match.govclose.com/

The US government just reauthorized one of the most powerful small business funding programs in American history — and most people have never heard of it. In this video, I break down everything you need to know about the SBIR reauthorization, including a brand new $30 million award that has never existed before.

📌 WHAT YOU'LL LEARN
The SBIR program has pumped over $81 billion into more than 34,000 small businesses since 1982, producing 70,000 patents and over 700 publicly traded companies. After a six-month freeze — the longest disruption in the program's 43-year history — Congress passed a five-year reauthorization through 2031 with major changes every small business owner needs to understand.
In this video I cover exactly what changed, what the new $30 million Strategic Breakthrough Award is, who qualifies, and what you should be doing right now to position your business before the topics go live in May.

THE PHASE 2 STRATEGIC BREAKTHROUGH AWARD
A standard SBIR Phase Two award is up to $1.8 million over two years. This new award goes up to $30 million over 48 months. Here's what you need to qualify:

- At least one prior Phase Two award
- 100% matching funds from private capital or non-SBIR government funding
- Demonstrated technology backed by market research
- For defense applications: commitment from a Program Executive Officer or higher


CHAPTERS
00:00 – The SBIR Program Is Back: What Just Changed
01:00 – What Is SBIR? America's Seed Fund Explained
02:00 – The Companies SBIR Built: Qualcomm, iRobot, and More
03:00 – How SBIR Works: Phase One, Phase Two, Phase Three
04:00 – The Six-Month Freeze: What Happened and Why
05:00 – The New Law: Innovation and Economic Security Act
05:30 – Change #1: Foreign Security Screening Gets Stricter
07:00 – Change #2: Proposal Caps and the End of SBIR Mills
08:00 – Change #3: Bridging the Valley of Death
10:00 – Change #4: Technical and Business Assistance Upgrade
11:00 – The $30 Million Strategic Breakthrough Award
12:30 –  Who Can Qualify
13:00 – How to Position Your Business Right Now

RESOURCES & LINKS
🔹 Find SBIR Topics: https://www.sbir.gov
🔹 Start Your GovCon Journey: https://www.govclose.com
🔹 Hire a GovClose Certified Consultant: https://match.govclose.com

👤 WHO THIS CHANNEL IS FOR
If you're a small business owner, startup founder, account executive, or consultant working in or trying to break into the federal market, this channel is built for you. I'm Rick — retired USAF Lt. Colonel, former DoD acquisitions officer, and founder of GovClose. I've helped hundreds of individuals learn the government contracting art form and generate real revenue from it.

#sbir  #smallbusiness  #governmentcontracts  #federalfunding  #govcon  #sttr  #smallbusinessgrants  #startupfunding  #DefenseContracting #federalcontracting  #InnovationFunding #businessfunding  #govclose  #entrepreneurship  #smallbusinessowner  #governmentfunding  #techstartups  #SBIRPhase2 #federalgrants  #businessgrowth 

Watch Next
1. How I teach government contracting to a ten-year-old. https://youtu.be/NzM23bK3g8I

2. U.S. Government R&D funding: https://youtu.be/Dg9FPoY7E_s

Connect with Rick on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/govclose/
